_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "think: This is a long thought that should be truncated in the header display" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the agent text "I've considered my approach." to appear. The thinking content element (".thinking-content") should be visible and contain the text "This is a long thought".
